tests.description: Every entry has a non-empty category string
Every entry has a non-empty description string
Every entry has at least one paramKey
Every key of VisualParams is covered by at least one entry's paramKeys
No paramKey appears in more than one entry (no duplicates across entries)
No description contains raw identifiers (IP, user-agent, exact location, country code, browser name)
Each description is under 60 characters (keeps overlay concise)
Categories include at least time, device, location, and motion
Hint list contains one <li> per INFLUENCE_HINTS entry
No <li> text contains raw identifiers (IP address pattern, user-agent fragments, country codes)
Hint list renders at least entries for time, device, location, and motion
Total overlay panel text (excluding close button and hints) remains under 500 characters
Hint list renders correctly after toggling overlay open, closed, then open again

testFiles.description: Unit tests for the hint registry data integrity
Add US-023 influence hints describe block to existing info overlay tests

notes:
T-023-16 scopes the 500-char check to

elements only, so the hint list text does not conflict with the existing US-022 conciseness test.
T-023-05 hardcodes the 8 VisualParams keys; if the interface changes, this test must be updated alongside the compile-time completeness check in the registry.
T-023-18 reads style.css directly via readFileSync following the existing pattern in the overlay test file.
